title: Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup

seo.title: How to Make Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup — Easy Mexican Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup. This easy Mexican recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas. Perfect for a comforting family meal.
longTailKeywords: how to make Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup
easy Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup recipe
authentic Mexican Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup
lowCompetitionKeywords: homemade Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup
Mexican Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup recipe
seo.h1: Authentic Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup Recipe
h2Headings: What is Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup?
Pro Tips for the Best Results
seo.imageAlt: Authentic Mexican Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup — a beloved Mexican classic

description: Pozole Rojo is a hearty and flavorful Mexican soup, renowned for its rich red broth and tender pork. It features plump hominy kernels, simmered to perfection with a vibrant chili sauce. Garnished with fresh toppings, it's a comforting and celebratory dish that truly embodies Mexican culinary tradition.

instructions.title: Cook the Pork
instructions.text: Place the pork shoulder cubes in a large pot or Dutch oven. Add 4 cups of water, half of the roughly chopped onion, 2 peeled garlic cloves, and 1 bay leaf. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45-60 minutes, or until the pork is tender. Skim any foam that rises to the surface. Once cooked, remove pork and shred or cut into smaller pieces. Reserve the cooking liquid.

instructions.title: Prepare the Chiles
instructions.text: While the pork cooks, rehydrate the dried guajillo and ancho chiles. Remove stems and seeds. Place them in a small saucepan, cover with water, and bring to a simmer for 10-15 minutes until softened. Drain the chiles, reserving a small amount of the soaking liquid.

instructions.title: Blend the Chile Sauce
instructions.text: In a blender, combine the rehydrated chiles, the remaining 2 peeled garlic cloves, the other half of the roughly chopped onion, 1 teaspoon of dried Mexican oregano, 1/2 teaspoon of ground cumin, and a splash of the reserved chile soaking liquid or chicken broth. Blend until very smooth. If needed, add more liquid to achieve a pourable consistency.

instructions.title: Strain and Simmer the Sauce
instructions.text: Pour the blended chile sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot or the pot with the reserved pork cooking liquid. Press the solids with a spoon to extract all the liquid, discarding the pulp. This step ensures a smooth, rich broth without any bits of chile skin. Bring the strained sauce to a gentle simmer.

instructions.title: Combine and Finish the Pozole
instructions.text: Add the shredded pork, drained and rinsed hominy, and 6 cups of chicken broth to the pot with the chile sauce. Add the remaining bay leaf. Bring the soup to a gentle simmer and cook for at least 20-30 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld. Season generously with salt to taste. The longer it simmers, the richer the flavor.

instructions.title: Serve with Toppings
instructions.text: Ladle the hot Pozole Rojo into bowls. Serve immediately with a variety of traditional toppings on the side for guests to customize their bowl. Common toppings include lime wedges, shredded cabbage, sliced radishes, diced white onion, avocado slices, and crispy tostadas. Enjoy this comforting Mexican classic!

tips: For a richer broth, lightly toast the dried chiles in a dry skillet for a minute or two before rehydrating. Be careful not to burn them, as this can make the sauce bitter.
The key to a truly authentic Pozole Rojo is a well-strained chile sauce. Do not skip straining the blended chiles; it ensures a silky-smooth and vibrant broth.
Pozole tastes even better the next day! Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days. Reheat gently on the stovetop.
article: Pozole Rojo Red Hominy Soup is a beloved Mexican Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Mexican. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
